notes: orders exhausts its postgres connection pool first; timeouts back up the call chain. api-gateway shows the highest error counts but is the LAST victim. payments degrades in parallel as a fan-out sibling of orders under checkout. search is healthy (decoy edge).
_design_note: Paged on api-gateway because that is where the customer-facing 5xx is measured. This is the edge of the system, not necessarily the source.
